name: virtual-lab-experiment
description: Provider-selectable, agent-led machine-learning experiments for numeric tabular datasets.

interface.shortDescription: Run agent-led ML experiments with full provenance
interface.longDescription: Choose an LLM provider and model, create an experiment-specific scientist team, compare regression models, search multi-objective candidates, and record all conversations, code, execution output, metrics, and results.
defaultPrompt: Use $run-virtual-lab-experiment with my chosen provider and model.
Create a Virtual Lab team and optimize my target parameters.
Run an offline example and record every artifact.
